SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2013 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-23-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MUST SHOW UP AT THE NEXT HEARING TO INFORM COURT REGARDING STATUS OF THIS CASE. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY LIWEN YU SET FOR NOV-07-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-08-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN 506. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY $200.00 PER MONTH ON THE 10TH DAY OF EACH MONTH. BEGINNING ON NOV 10, 2012, BY PERSONAL CHECK", JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS *(2ND)* FILED BY DEFENDANT YU, LIWEN HEARING SET FOR NOV-07-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-08-2013 IS CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-12-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "PARTIES AGREE THAT THE PAYMENTS WILL BE INCREASED TO $500.00/MONTH, PLUS INTEREST AT 10% STARTING TODAY." APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (NOTE: DEFENDANT PAID PLAINTIFF $200.00 IN COURT TODAY).
